channel.title: Destiny Code — Energy Blueprint Blog
channel.description: Ancient BaZi wisdom decoded for the modern seeker. Five Elements, Day Master types, career, love, wealth, and life path insights.

item.title: Your 2026 BaZi Forecast: What the Year of the Horse Brings
item.description: The Year of the Fire Horse brings transformation. Discover what your Day Master can expect in career, love, and wealth for 2026.

item.title: The Five Elements and Your Health: A BaZi Perspective
item.description: Each of the Five Elements governs specific organs and body systems. Learn what your elemental balance says about your health tendencies.

item.title: Understanding Wealth Luck in Your BaZi Chart
item.description: Your BaZi chart contains specific indicators for material abundance. Learn how Wealth Stars and element balance shape your earning potential.

item.title: BaZi Love Compatibility: How Elements Shape Your Relationships
item.description: Discover how the Five Elements interact in relationships. Learn which Day Master combinations create harmony and which need conscious balance.

item.title: What Your BaZi Chart Says About Your Career Path
item.description: Your birth month pillar reveals your career compass. Learn how your Day Master and element balance point to your ideal profession.

item.title: 2026 Year of the Fire Horse: Complete Element Forecast
item.description: 2026 is the Year of the Fire Horse (Bing Wu). Discover what this dynamic energy means for each Day Master and how to navigate the year ahead.

item.title: How to Find Your Day Master: The 10 Types Explained
item.description: Your Day Master is the core of your BaZi chart. Learn the 10 types — Jia through Gui — and what each reveals about your personality and life path.

item.title: Chinese Zodiac Elements Compatibility: Beyond Sun Signs
item.description: Move beyond simple zodiac sign matching. Learn how the Five Elements create real compatibility — and conflict — in relationships.

item.title: What is BaZi? A Beginner's Guide to Chinese Astrology
item.description: BaZi (Eight Characters) is a 1000-year-old Chinese system that maps your birth moment into an energy blueprint. Learn the basics in plain English.

item.title: Eastern vs Western Astrology: Which is More Accurate?
item.description: Western astrology uses your Sun sign. BaZi uses eight characters from your birth year, month, day, and hour. Compare accuracy, depth, and practical use.

item.title: The Five Elements Personality Framework — More Accurate Than MBTI?
item.description: Most personality tests rely on self-reported answers. The Five Elements system calculates your type from your birth data — no questionnaire needed.

item.title: The "Wandering Star" Energy: Why Some People Never Feel Like They Fit In
item.description: Some charts carry a Traveling Horse or Wandering Star configuration — an energy pattern that makes conventional belonging feel impossible. Here's why.

item.title: BaZi vs Western Astrology: What's the Difference and Why It Matters
item.description: Western astrology gives you one Sun sign. BaZi reads eight characters — over a million combinations. Compare the two systems and discover your Day Master.
